chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-800 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case. 05-03-2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ashok Kumar K. Jamba, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondents submits that already preliminary inspection reports are available with the respondents. The issue of providing gas to the petitioner’s village is suspended for want of funds. As soon as funds are released by the Government of Pakistan, the lines for supplying gas to the petitioner’s village would be laid down. He further submits that since new Government has been set up in the Federation, he is hopeful that funds would be released within 2/3 months. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. If the funds are released or in case funds are not released within a period of three months, report shall be filed in this petition for a perusal. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
